_comment: Codex CLI lifecycle hooks for AgenticMail. Codex discovers plugin-shipped hook files at <plugin>/hooks/hooks.json (see codex-rs/hooks/src/engine/discovery.rs).
_warning: On install, agenticmail-codex rewrites the `command` paths below to absolute filesystem paths resolved from the installed @agenticmail/codex package. The bare `agenticmail-codex-mail-hook` shipped here works only when the npm-global bin dir is on $PATH; the install step replaces it with `node "<abs-path>/mail-hook.js"` which is resilient to PATH config.
